question: Will Jinbaobao's tin production fall below 35 kilotonnes on May 31, 2026?
reason: Jinbaobao's tin export ban has significantly tightened global supply, potentially reducing production.
evidence: Jinbaobao's tin export ban covers about 12% of global supply, tightening the market significantly.
Global tin prices have surged to a three-year high, indicating supply constraints.
China's refined tin production has experienced month-on-month declines due to raw material shortages and cost pressures.
